mapper.sql: id, template_id, version, template_json, change_log, published, publish_time, protection_enabled, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tpl_template_version WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM tpl_template_version WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY version DESC
SELECT FROM tpl_template_version WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND published = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY publish_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.sql: id, template_id, version, change_log, published, publish_time, protection_enabled, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tpl_template_version WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY version DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tpl_template_version ( template_id, version, template_json, change_log, published, publish_time, protection_enabled, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{templateId}, #{version}, #{templateJson}, #{changeLog}, COALESCE(#{published}, 0), #{publishTime}, COALESCE(#{protectionEnabled}, 1), #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy}, NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tpl_template_version
update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy}, template_json = #{templateJson}, change_log = #{changeLog}, published = #{published}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, protection_enabled = #{protectionEnabled},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tpl_template_version SET published = 1, publish_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
